DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPT. 301 FOR THE ASSIGNED JUDGE PRO TEM, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MONDAY, FEBRUARY 3, 2020, AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HELBRAUN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Re Plaintiff Alex Mas Form Interrogatories, Etc.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ALEX MA's Motion To Compel Discovery Re Plaintiff Alex Mas Form Interrogatories, Etc is Continued to February 14, 2020 to be heard by Judge Pro Tem Steve Stein at 1:30 p.m. in room 301 per stipulation and approval of the Court. Parties to arrange for court reporter for hearing with costs shared equally. Parties to appear in person. The court intends to establish sequenced and rolling document productions connected to specific categories of inquiry. Parties to address narrowing of document requests by category and date range; rulings on objections to document requests; identification of documents served on January 9, 2020 with C.C.P. 2030.280 (a) code compliance; status of defendant's document review of documents prepared and sent or received by and between defendant's employees, Stephanie Tsui, Beverly Chan, Paul Fox and Diana Kawasaki-Yee, which reference, refer or pertain to plaintiff during the period November 7, 2016 to April 23, 2019; preparation of privilege logs in connection with all documents; establishment of dates for future document productions. The court intends to rule on objections to form interrogatories. Special interrogatories will be addressed at a second hearing following court ordered or stipulated narrowing scope of categories and completion of meet and confer efforts. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Re Plaintiff Alex Mas Form Interrogatories, Etc.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Continued To Feb-11-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
No appearances in the matter.

Ruling: PLAINTIFF ALEX MA's Motion To Compel Discovery Re Plaintiff Alex Ma's Form Interrogatories is continued to February 11, 2020, at 9:00 a.m., to give Defendant North East Medical Services the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.7(B). Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Dept. 301 for the assigned Judge Pro Tem, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than Monday, February 3, 2020, at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per California Rules of Court 3.1110(f). The Court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge Pro Tem: David Helbraun; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
